'''Half-Axe Pass''' was an area of [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] located close to [[Cadgel Meadows]].

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], it was the site of the [[Cleansing of New Plympto#One month of fighting|Battle of Half-Axe Pass]], where an army of [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] were slaughtered, one month after the official end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Half-Axe Pass was ruined when a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] bioweapon destroyed New Plympto in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 80|''Republic'' 80]] {{1st}}
